reviews.comment:
Todo muy organizado es autoservicio, lugar limpio, baños impecables, atención buena, si sos socio del ACA te hacen un descuento, las promociones son abundantes, lugar hiperventilado, luminoso con buena vista a la AVDA. RIVADAVIA.
OPINIÓN RECOMENDABLE,   TIENE ESTACIONAMIENTO. ME REFIERO AL ACA FLORES TOTALMENTE RENOVADO.

(Translated by Google)
Everything is very organized, it's self-service, the place is clean, the bathrooms are spotless, and the service is good. If you're an ACA member, they give you a discount. The promotions are plentiful. The place is well-ventilated and bright with a great view of Avenida Rivadavia.
HIGHLY RECOMMENDED, IT HAS PARKING. I'M REFERRING TO THE FULLY RENOVATED ACA FLORES.
